allow: Bash(node -e "const {POOL} = await import\('./src/lib/pool.js'\); const easy = POOL.filter\(q=>q.level==='easy'\); const normal = POOL.filter\(q=>q.level==='normal'\); const expert = POOL.filter\(q=>q.level==='expert'\); console.log\('total:', POOL.length, 'easy:', easy.length, 'normal:', normal.length, 'expert:', expert.length\);" --input-type=module)
